notFound.title: Session not found
notFound.body: The code "{{code}}" doesn't match any active session.

pickPartner.subtitle: Select your name on this device.

waiting.title: Share this code with your partner.
waiting.instructions: On their phone, your partner opens the app, taps "Join with a code", enters {{code}}, and their name.

waitingFinish.autoReveal: The results page will appear automatically once you've both finished.

errors.cannotGenerateCode: Unable to generate a session code
